commits: 7d829a2 - bober(sprint-3): WhoopSyncAdapter + bober medical whoop sync CLI

filesChanged.description: WhoopSyncAdapter + WHOOP_FIELD_MAP (4 collections) + mapWhoopRecords pure helper; sync(window,sink) pagination loop, fail-closed error propagation, per-batch writeBatch. No network import.
fakeClient + temp-dir HealthDataStore: mapping/source/counts (sc-3-2), idempotent resume (sc-3-3), partial-failure + re-run (sc-3-4).

Exported WhoopSyncDeps + runWhoopSync() helper; `bober medical whoop sync [--since <iso>]` subcommand (assertAllowed-first, env/token checks w/ exit 1 never-throw, store.close() in finally, 'ingest' audit). `medical import` block unchanged.
vi.mock loadConfig + WhoopTokenStore; runWhoopSync() direct-call: axis-off (sc-3-5), env-unset + no-token (sc-3-6), success prints/close/audit (sc-3-8), commander smoke.

notes: All 8 criteria met. 2473->2484 (+11). runWhoopSync() direct-call helper (mirrors run.test.ts runRunCommand) keeps CLI tests offline. No network import in whoop-sync.ts or medical.ts; all HTTP in whoop-client.ts. id left to store's content-derived SHA-256 (not WHOOP UUID). Clock read only at CLI boundary; adapter/store never read clock. ingest audit IDs/enums-only (PHI-free verified).
